```{r setup, results="hide"}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = F, message = FALSE)
source("utils.R")
theme_set(theme_light())
```


```{r setup}
# ============================================================
# Setup
# ============================================================
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)

theme_set(theme_light())

# ============================================================
# Common settings
# ============================================================
colors_model <- c(
  "Dense Neural Net" = "#0072B2",
  "SVM (RBF)"        = "#D55E00",
  "Random Forest"    = "#009E73",
  "XGBoost"          = "#6A3D9A"
)

x_breaks <- c(1000, 4000, 7000, 10000, 15000, 20000, 30000)

# ============================================================
# AUPRC (A)
# ============================================================
folder_path <- "output1725/result_0122/result/0/0/0"
file_list <- list.files(folder_path, "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)

df_auprc <- map_dfr(file_list, function(file) {
  d <- readRDS(file)
  fname <- basename(file)

  tibble(
    training_size = str_extract(fname, "n\\d+") |> str_remove("n") |> as.numeric(),
    model_type    = str_extract(fname, "rf|svm|nn|xgb"),
    value = map_dbl(d$metrics, \(m) {
      i <- which(m$metric == "auprc")
      if (length(i) == 0) NA_real_ else m$value[i[1]]
    })
  )
}) |>
  mutate(model_type = recode(
    model_type,
    rf="Random Forest", svm="SVM (RBF)",
    nn="Dense Neural Net", xgb="XGBoost"
  ))

p_auprc <- ggplot(df_auprc, aes(training_size, value, color=model_type)) +
  geom_smooth(method="loess", se=TRUE, span=0.8, linewidth=1) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=x_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits=c(0,1),
    breaks=seq(0,1,0.1),
    labels=percent_format(accuracy=1)
  ) +
  labs(x=NULL, y="AUPRC", color=NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=16) +
  theme(legend.position="top")

# ============================================================
# Manual Review (B)
# ============================================================
folder_path <- "output1725/result_0122/result/0"
file_list <- list.files(folder_path, "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)

df_review <- map_dfr(file_list, function(file) {
  d <- readRDS(file)
  fname <- basename(file)

  tibble(
    training_size = str_extract(fname, "n\\d+") |> str_remove("n") |> as.numeric(),
    model_type    = str_extract(fname, "rf|svm|nn|xgb"),
    value = map_dbl(d$metrics, \(m) {
      i <- which(m$metric == "review_pct_99")
      if (length(i) == 0) NA_real_ else m$value[i[1]]
    })
  )
}) |>
  mutate(model_type = recode(
    model_type,
    rf="Random Forest", svm="SVM (RBF)",
    nn="Dense Neural Net", xgb="XGBoost"
  ))

p_review <- ggplot(df_review, aes(training_size, value, color=model_type)) +
  geom_smooth(method="loess", se=TRUE, span=0.8, linewidth=1) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=x_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits=c(0,1),
    breaks=seq(0,1,0.1),
    labels=percent_format(accuracy=1)
  ) +
  labs(x=NULL, y="Manual review (%)", color=NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=16) +
  theme(legend.position="top")

# ============================================================
# AUROC (C)
# ============================================================
df_auroc <- map_dfr(file_list, function(file) {
  d <- readRDS(file)
  fname <- basename(file)

  tibble(
    training_size = str_extract(fname, "n\\d+") |> str_remove("n") |> as.numeric(),
    model_type    = str_extract(fname, "rf|svm|nn|xgb"),
    value = map_dbl(d$metrics, \(m) {
      i <- which(m$metric == "auroc")
      if (length(i) == 0) NA_real_ else m$value[i[1]]
    })
  )
}) |>
  mutate(model_type = recode(
    model_type,
    rf="Random Forest", svm="SVM (RBF)",
    nn="Dense Neural Net", xgb="XGBoost"
  ))

p_auroc <- ggplot(df_auroc, aes(training_size, value, color=model_type)) +
  geom_smooth(method="loess", se=TRUE, span=0.8, linewidth=1) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=x_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits=c(0.5,1),
    breaks=seq(0.5,1,0.1),
    labels=percent_format(accuracy=1)
  ) +
  labs(x=NULL, y="AUROC", color=NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=16) +
  theme(legend.position="top")

# ============================================================
# F1 (D)
# ============================================================
df_f1 <- map_dfr(file_list, function(file) {
  d <- readRDS(file)
  fname <- basename(file)

  tibble(
    training_size = str_extract(fname, "n\\d+") |> str_remove("n") |> as.numeric(),
    model_type    = str_extract(fname, "rf|svm|nn|xgb"),
    value = map_dbl(d$metrics, \(m) {
      i <- which(m$metric == "f1")
      if (length(i) == 0) NA_real_ else m$value[i[1]]
    })
  )
}) |>
  mutate(model_type = recode(
    model_type,
    rf="Random Forest", svm="SVM (RBF)",
    nn="Dense Neural Net", xgb="XGBoost"
  ))

p_f1 <- ggplot(df_f1, aes(training_size, value, color=model_type)) +
  geom_smooth(method="loess", se=TRUE, span=0.75, linewidth=1) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=x_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits=c(0.5,1),
    breaks=seq(0.5,1,0.1),
    labels=percent_format(accuracy=1)
  ) +
  labs(x=NULL, y="F1 score", color=NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=16) +
  theme(legend.position="top")

# ============================================================
# Combine (AUPRC | Review / AUROC | F1)
# ============================================================
fig7 <-
  (p_auprc | p_review) /
  (p_auroc | p_f1) +
  plot_layout(guides="collect") +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels="A") &
  theme(
    legend.position="top",
    plot.tag=element_text(size=18, face="bold")
  )

fig7 <- fig7 & labs(x="Size of training data")

print(fig7)

# ============================================================
# Save
# ============================================================
ggsave(
  filename=paste0("figures1725/Figure7_final_",format(Sys.Date(),"%m%d"),".png"),
  plot=fig7,
  width=14,
  height=10,
  dpi=300
)
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# Setup
# ============================================================
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)

theme_set(theme_light())

# ============================================================
# Common settings
# ============================================================
colors_model <- c(
  "Dense Neural Net" = "#0072B2",
  "SVM (RBF)"        = "#D55E00",
  "Random Forest"    = "#009E73",
  "XGBoost"          = "#6A3D9A"
)

x_breaks <- c(1000, 4000, 7000, 10000, 15000, 20000, 30000)

# ============================================================
# A. F1 score
# ============================================================
folder_path <- "output1725/result_0122/result/0/0/0"
file_list <- list.files(folder_path, "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)

df_f1 <- map_dfr(file_list, function(file) {

  d <- readRDS(file)
  fname <- basename(file)

  tibble(
    training_size = str_extract(fname, "n\\d+") |> str_remove("n") |> as.numeric(),
    model_type    = str_extract(fname, "rf|svm|nn|xgb"),
    value = map_dbl(d$metrics, \(m) {
      i <- which(m$metric == "f1")
      if (length(i) == 0) NA_real_ else m$value[i[1]]
    })
  )
}) |>
  mutate(
    model_type = recode(
      model_type,
      rf  = "Random Forest",
      svm = "SVM (RBF)",
      nn  = "Dense Neural Net",
      xgb = "XGBoost"
    )
  )

p_f1 <- ggplot(df_f1, aes(training_size, value, color = model_type)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, span = 0.75, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0.5, 1.0),
    breaks = seq(0.5, 1.0, 0.05),
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "F1 score", color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

# ============================================================
# B. Manual Review % (99% PPV/NPV)
# ============================================================
folder_path <- "output1725/result_0122/result/0"
file_list <- list.files(folder_path, "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)

df_review <- map_dfr(file_list, function(file) {

  d <- readRDS(file)
  fname <- basename(file)

  tibble(
    training_size = str_extract(fname, "n\\d+") |> str_remove("n") |> as.numeric(),
    model_type    = str_extract(fname, "rf|svm|nn|xgb"),
    value = map_dbl(d$metrics, \(m) {
      i <- which(m$metric == "review_pct_99")
      if (length(i) == 0) NA_real_ else m$value[i[1]]
    })
  )
}) |>
  mutate(
    model_type = recode(
      model_type,
      rf  = "Random Forest",
      svm = "SVM (RBF)",
      nn  = "Dense Neural Net",
      xgb = "XGBoost"
    )
  )

p_review <- ggplot(df_review, aes(training_size, value, color = model_type)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, span = 0.8, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0.1, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1),
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Manual review (%)", color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

# ============================================================
# C. AUROC
# ============================================================
df_auroc <- map_dfr(file_list, function(file) {

  d <- readRDS(file)
  fname <- basename(file)

  tibble(
    training_size = str_extract(fname, "n\\d+") |> str_remove("n") |> as.numeric(),
    model_type    = str_extract(fname, "rf|svm|nn|xgb"),
    value = map_dbl(d$metrics, \(m) {
      i <- which(m$metric == "auroc")
      if (length(i) == 0) NA_real_ else m$value[i[1]]
    })
  )
}) |>
  mutate(
    model_type = recode(
      model_type,
      rf  = "Random Forest",
      svm = "SVM (RBF)",
      nn  = "Dense Neural Net",
      xgb = "XGBoost"
    )
  )

p_auroc <- ggplot(df_auroc, aes(training_size, value, color = model_type)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, span = 0.8, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0.5, 1.0),
    breaks = seq(0.5, 1.0, 0.05),
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "AUROC", color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

# ============================================================
# D. AUPRC
# ============================================================
df_auprc <- map_dfr(file_list, function(file) {

  d <- readRDS(file)
  fname <- basename(file)

  tibble(
    training_size = str_extract(fname, "n\\d+") |> str_remove("n") |> as.numeric(),
    model_type    = str_extract(fname, "rf|svm|nn|xgb"),
    value = map_dbl(d$metrics, \(m) {
      i <- which(m$metric == "auprc")
      if (length(i) == 0) NA_real_ else m$value[i[1]]
    })
  )
}) |>
  mutate(
    model_type = recode(
      model_type,
      rf  = "Random Forest",
      svm = "SVM (RBF)",
      nn  = "Dense Neural Net",
      xgb = "XGBoost"
    )
  )

p_auprc <- ggplot(df_auprc, aes(training_size, value, color = model_type)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, span = 0.8, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors_model) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = x_breaks) +
  scale_y_continuous(
  limits = c(0, 1),
  breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1),
  labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)
) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "AUPRC", color = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

# ============================================================
# Combine into 2 × 2 panel (PATCHWORK-SAFE)
# ============================================================
fig7 <-
  (p_f1 | p_review) /
  (p_auroc | p_auprc) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    plot.tag = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold")
  )

# ✅ shared x-axis label (compatible with all patchwork versions)
fig7 <- fig7 & labs(x = "Size of training data")

print(fig7)

# ============================================================
# Save
# ============================================================
ggsave(
  filename = paste0("figures1725/Figure7_ABCD_", format(Sys.Date(), "%m%d"), ".png"),
  plot = fig7,
  width = 14,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 300
)




```


```{r}
library(tidyverse)

folder_path <- "output1725/result_0122/result/0/0/0"
file_list <- list.files(path = folder_path, pattern = "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Read + Extract results (FAST aligned version)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
result_f1 <- map_dfr(file_list, function(file) {

  df <- readRDS(file)

  file_name <- basename(file)

  training_size <- str_extract(file_name, "n\\d+") %>%
    str_replace("n", "") %>%
    as.numeric()

  # ✅ include xgb if needed
  model_type <- str_extract(file_name, "rf|svm|nn|xgb")

  # ✅ FAST extraction (avoid tibble + filter)
  f1_values <- map_dbl(df$metrics, function(m) {

    idx <- which(m$metric == "f1")

    if (length(idx) == 0) return(NA_real_)

    m$value[idx[1]]
  })

  tibble(
    file_name = file_name,
    model_type = model_type,
    training_size = training_size,
    f1 = f1_values
  )
})

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Clean model names
# ------------------------------------------------------------
result_f1 <- result_f1 %>%
  mutate(
    model_type = case_when(
      model_type == "rf"  ~ "Random Forest",
      model_type == "svm" ~ "SVM (RBF)",
      model_type == "nn"  ~ "Dense Neural Net",
      model_type == "xgb" ~ "XGBoost",
      TRUE ~ model_type
    )
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot
# ------------------------------------------------------------
p <- ggplot(result_f1, aes(x = training_size, y = f1, color = model_type)) +
  geom_smooth(
    se = TRUE,
    method = "loess",
    span = 0.75,
    linewidth = 1   # ✅ replace deprecated size
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Size of training data",
    y = "F1 score",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Dense Neural Net" = "#0072B2",
    "SVM (RBF)"        = "#D55E00",
    "Random Forest"    = "#009E73",
    "XGBoost"          = "#6A3D9A"
  )) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(1000, 4000, 7000, 10000,15000,20000,30000)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0.6, 1.0, 0.1),
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(0.6, 1.0)
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

print(p)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save figure with today's date+time
# ------------------------------------------------------------
out_file <- paste0(
  "figures1725/7a_",
  format(Sys.time(), "%m%d"),
  ".png"
)

ggsave(out_file, plot = p, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

cat("✅ Saved figure:", out_file, "\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Summary table
# ------------------------------------------------------------
library(scales)

summary_f1 <- result_f1 %>%
  group_by(model_type, training_size) %>%
  summarise(
    f1_mean = mean(f1, na.rm = TRUE),
    f1_min  = min(f1, na.rm = TRUE),
    f1_max  = max(f1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(model_type, training_size)

summary_f1 %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("f1_"), ~ percent(.x, accuracy = 0.01))) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

print(p)



```



#7b
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Folder path
# ------------------------------------------------------------
folder_path <- "output1725/result_0122/result/0"

file_list <- list.files(
  path = folder_path,
  pattern = "\\.rds$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Read + Extract results (FAST aligned version)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
result <- map_dfr(file_list, function(file) {

  df <- readRDS(file)

  file_name <- basename(file)

  training_size <- str_extract(file_name, "n\\d+") %>%
    str_replace("n", "") %>%
    as.numeric()

  # ✅ include xgb
  model_type <- str_extract(file_name, "rf|svm|nn|xgb")

  # ✅ FAST extraction: avoid tibble + filter
  review_values <- map_dbl(df$metrics, function(m) {

    idx <- which(m$metric == "review_pct_99")

    if (length(idx) == 0) return(NA_real_)

    m$value[idx[1]]
  })

  tibble(
    file_name = file_name,
    model_type = model_type,
    training_size = training_size,
    review_pct_99 = review_values
  )
})

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Clean model names (ONLY once)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
result <- result %>%
  mutate(
    model_type = case_when(
      model_type == "rf"  ~ "Random Forest",
      model_type == "svm" ~ "SVM (RBF)",
      model_type == "nn"  ~ "Dense Neural Net",
      model_type == "xgb" ~ "XGBoost",
      TRUE ~ model_type
    )
  )

print(result)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Summary table
# ------------------------------------------------------------
summary_table <- result %>%
  group_by(model_type, training_size) %>%
  summarise(
    max_review  = max(review_pct_99, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_review  = min(review_pct_99, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_review = mean(review_pct_99, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(model_type, training_size)

print(summary_table)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot
# ------------------------------------------------------------
p <- ggplot(result,
            aes(x = training_size,
                y = review_pct_99,
                color = model_type)) +

  geom_smooth(
    se = TRUE,
    method = "loess",
    span = 0.8,
    linewidth = 1   # ✅ replace deprecated size
  ) +

  labs(
    x = "Size of training data",
    y = "Percentage of Manual Review",
    color = NULL
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Dense Neural Net" = "#0072B2",
    "SVM (RBF)"        = "#D55E00",
    "Random Forest"    = "#009E73",
    "XGBoost"          = "#6A3D9A"
  )) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1000, 4000, 7000, 10000, 15000, 20000, 30000)
  ) +

  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.1),
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(0.1, 1)
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

print(p)

ggsave(
  filename = paste0(
    "figures1725/7b_",
    format(Sys.time(), "%m%d"),
    ".png"
  ),
  plot = p,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)


print(p)

print(summary_table, n = Inf)

```

#auprc_size
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

folder_path <- "output1725/result_0122/result/0/0/0"

file_list <- list.files(
  path = folder_path,
  pattern = "\\.rds$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Extract AUPRC
# ------------------------------------------------------------
result <- map_dfr(file_list, function(file) {

  df <- readRDS(file)
  file_name <- basename(file)

  training_size <- str_extract(file_name, "n\\d+") %>%
    str_replace("n", "") %>%
    as.numeric()

  model_type <- str_extract(file_name, "rf|svm|nn|xgb")

  # ✅ Extract AUPRC metric
  auprc_values <- map_dbl(df$metrics, function(m) {

    idx <- which(m$metric == "auprc")   # ✅ change here

    if (length(idx) == 0) return(NA_real_)

    m$value[idx[1]]
  })

  tibble(
    file_name = file_name,
    model_type = model_type,
    training_size = training_size,
    auprc = auprc_values               # ✅ column name
  )
})

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Clean model names
# ------------------------------------------------------------
result <- result %>%
  mutate(
    model_type = case_when(
      model_type == "rf"  ~ "Random Forest",
      model_type == "svm" ~ "SVM (RBF)",
      model_type == "nn"  ~ "Dense Neural Net",
      model_type == "xgb" ~ "XGBoost",
      TRUE ~ model_type
    )
  )

print(result)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Summary table
# ------------------------------------------------------------
summary_table <- result %>%
  group_by(model_type, training_size) %>%
  summarise(
    max_auprc  = max(auprc, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_auprc  = min(auprc, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_auprc = mean(auprc, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(model_type, training_size)

print(summary_table)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot (AUPRC as Percent)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
p <- ggplot(result,
            aes(x = training_size,
                y = auprc,
                color = model_type)) +

  geom_smooth(
    se = TRUE,
    method = "loess",
    span = 0.8,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +

  labs(
    x = "Size of training data",
    y = "AUPRC",
    color = NULL
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Dense Neural Net" = "#0072B2",
    "SVM (RBF)"        = "#D55E00",
    "Random Forest"    = "#009E73",
    "XGBoost"          = "#6A3D9A"
  )) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1000, 4000, 7000, 10000, 15000, 20000, 30000)
  ) +

  # ✅ Percent y-axis
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0, 1.0, 0.1),
    limits = c(0, 1.0),
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

print(p)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save figure (MMDD only)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
ggsave(
  filename = paste0(
    "figures1725/7b_AUPRC_",
    format(Sys.Date(), "%m%d"),
    ".png"
  ),
  plot = p,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

print(p)

```

#auroc_size
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

folder_path <- "output1725/result_0122/result/0/0/0"

file_list <- list.files(
  path = folder_path,
  pattern = "\\.rds$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Extract AUROC
# ------------------------------------------------------------
result <- map_dfr(file_list, function(file) {

  df <- readRDS(file)
  file_name <- basename(file)

  training_size <- str_extract(file_name, "n\\d+") %>%
    str_replace("n", "") %>%
    as.numeric()

  model_type <- str_extract(file_name, "rf|svm|nn|xgb")

  auroc_values <- map_dbl(df$metrics, function(m) {

    idx <- which(m$metric == "auroc")   # ✅ AUROC metric

    if (length(idx) == 0) return(NA_real_)

    m$value[idx[1]]
  })

  tibble(
    file_name = file_name,
    model_type = model_type,
    training_size = training_size,
    auroc = auroc_values
  )
})

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Clean model names
# ------------------------------------------------------------
result <- result %>%
  mutate(
    model_type = case_when(
      model_type == "rf"  ~ "Random Forest",
      model_type == "svm" ~ "SVM (RBF)",
      model_type == "nn"  ~ "Dense Neural Net",
      model_type == "xgb" ~ "XGBoost",
      TRUE ~ model_type
    )
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Plot (AUROC as Percent)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
p <- ggplot(result,
            aes(x = training_size,
                y = auroc,
                color = model_type)) +

  geom_smooth(
    se = TRUE,
    method = "loess",
    span = 0.8,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +

  labs(
    x = "Size of training data",
    y = "AUROC",
    color = NULL
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Dense Neural Net" = "#0072B2",
    "SVM (RBF)"        = "#D55E00",
    "Random Forest"    = "#009E73",
    "XGBoost"          = "#6A3D9A"
  )) +

  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1000, 4000, 7000, 10000, 15000, 20000, 30000)
  ) +

  # ✅ Percent axis formatting
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq(0.5, 1.0, 0.05),
    limits = c(0.5, 1.0),
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)
  ) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

print(p)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Save figure (MMDD)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
ggsave(
  filename = paste0(
    "figures1725/7b_AUROC_",
    format(Sys.Date(), "%m%d"),
    ".png"
  ),
  plot = p,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)


```
